# Processed Data Directory

This directory will contain the processed and analyzed data files generated by the scripts.

## Generated Files (after running scripts):

- `raw_stock_data.csv` - Combined raw data from all individual stock CSVs
- `cleaned_stock_data.csv` - Data after cleaning (removing nulls, duplicates, etc.)
- `engineered_stock_data.csv` - Data with calculated technical indicators
- `top10_returns.csv` - Top 10 stocks by average daily return
- `top10_volatility.csv` - Top 10 most volatile stocks
- `overbought_stocks.csv` - Stocks with RSI > 70
- `oversold_stocks.csv` - Stocks with RSI < 30

## To regenerate these files:

Run the scripts in this order:
1. `python scripts/combine_stocks.py` - Combines individual stock CSVs
2. `python scripts/data_cleaning.py` - Cleans the combined data
3. `python scripts/feature_engineering.py` - Adds technical indicators
4. `python scripts/analytics.py` - Generates analytics and insights

## Note:
These files are automatically generated and should not be edited manually.
